creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Glad to hear that. I am kinda new to FreeBSD, so I am always wary that I might not do things in an optimal way. ;-)

I already have the patched version running on a small production system (some customers on it who want to test the ActiveSync stuff), so if anything weird happens, I will try my best to fix it and report it here.

Btw., I noticed that 'port test' fails for www/sogo (both current and with patch), but have not been able to pinpoint what causes this. Should I open that as a separate bug?
